import source
from source import find_in_sorted


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_find_in_sorted_last_element():
    """Test finding the last element in sorted array - reveals infinite recursion bug."""
    # The bug: when recursing into upper half, lower bound is mid instead of mid + 1
    # This causes infinite recursion when target is in upper half (like last element)
    result = find_in_sorted([3, 4, 5, 6, 7], 7)
    assert result == 4  # Index of element 7
